---
name: Question
about: Ask a question about using vue-code-reviewer
title: '[QUESTION] '
labels: question
assignees: ''

---

## Question
Clearly state your question about vue-code-reviewer.

**Example:** "How do I configure custom rules for my Vue 3 project?"

## Context
Provide context about:
- What you're trying to achieve
- What you've tried so far
- Where you're stuck

## Code Example
If applicable, provide code examples:

```javascript
// Your configuration
const config = {
  rules: {
    // Your custom rules
  }
};
```

## Environment
- vue-code-reviewer version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 18.0.0]
- Vue version: [e.g. Vue 3.4.0]
- Build tool: [e.g. Vite, Webpack, Nuxt]

## Research Done
Describe what you've already tried or researched:
- [ ] Read the README
- [ ] Checked existing issues
- [ ] Searched the documentation
- [ ] Tried different configurations

## Expected Answer
What kind of answer are you looking for?
- [ ] Configuration guidance
- [ ] Usage example
- [ ] Explanation of a feature
- [ ] Troubleshooting steps
- [ ] Other: [please specify]

## Additional Information
Add any other information that might help answer your question.
